subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. God testifieth that there is none other God but Me, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم شهد الله انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم قد
subcodes.subjects: @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
